description: Recto: Letter from Bū Zikrī (b. Eliyyahu the Judge?) to Abū ʿImrān Mūsā. In Judaeo-Arabic. Only the opening is preserved and a couple words from the margin. Verso: Note from Shelomo b. Eliyyahu to Mūsā concerning a book deal. "Give the boy the codex containing the 5 megillot. The buyer said he would only buy the two codices."
